header.message: I am a software engineer, a third-year university student. I love creating websites, apps, and games, enjoying every challenge and the creative process.

about.maintext: I am a software engineer, a third-year university student. I love creating websites, apps, and games, enjoying every challenge and the creative process. Technologies I've worked with:
about.animetext: Outside of my studies, I enjoy watching anime, especially Jujutsu Kaisen, Demon Slayer and Attack on Titan.

slider.dino: The game, inspired by Chrome's offline dinosaur game, features custom graphics created with Photoshop and unique features not found in the classic version.
slider.kanban: Interactive Kanban board built on React and TypeScript that lets you create, delete, edit, and drag and drop tasks between columns.
slider.michael: The website highlights my programming projects, skills, and 3D object using Three.js.
slider.todo: Todo List for managing tasks with separate lists, customizable icons, and light/dark themes.

projects.rocket: A rocket landing game on the Moon with custom physics including thrust and acceleration calculations, built with Vite.
projects.website: This site is built with HTML and CSS, featuring a custom Photoshop design. Download the Dino Adventure game here.
projects.rock: The game site is built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, offering a responsive experience for both computers and phones.
projects.burger: A fast food cafe website with an animated slider and a menu where users can add items to their cart.
projects.solar: A website featuring 3D planets created with Three.js, built using plain HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, with ESLint for code quality.
